rationale: Empirical re-verify in an absolute /tmp archive of a2f2451, shared worktree untouched (git status clean before/after). go build ./... clean; gofmt -l ./cmd ./internal empty; go vet ./internal/panel ./internal/complete clean. go test -count=1 ./internal/panel ./internal/complete ./cmd/mindspec all PASS (no z4ps flake surfaced, not in scope here). Mutation: disabled leg 9.5 (`false && len(unresolved)>0`) in the /tmp copy only, ran `go test ./internal/panel -run UnresolvedRequestChanges -v` — all three rows FAILED, and critically the renamed row reported `message missing "revA"` / `message missing "revB"` explicitly, proving revA/revB are not incidental substrings of fixed Block text (unlike old x/y). Restored gate.go, re-ran: all PASS again. git show --name-only HEAD confirms exactly 3 files; git diff 4dfebbcb a2f2451 -- internal/panel/gate.go is comment-only (byte-superset -> substring-set superset), tally.go untouched. e2e hardening string "unresolved REQUEST_CHANGES" is a literal in gate.go's Sprintf template (line 279), so the new assertion in panel_gate_e2e_test.go matches real code and genuinely pins to leg 9.5.
